description_long: This object is a small, realistic figurine of a young dog, likely a Labrador Retriever puppy, depicted in a sitting position. Its body is painted in a pale cream or light beige color with subtle shading to suggest fur texture and muscle definition. The dog has a rounded head, large expressive eyes, a short snout, and floppy ears that hang down on either side of its face. A light-colored collar encircles its neck, adding a touch of detail and realism. The tail is short and rests naturally along the ground, and the legs are tucked in a relaxed, lifelike pose. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, resembling painted ceramic or plaster.
description: A small, cream-colored Labrador Retriever puppy figurine with floppy ears, a short tail, and a light collar, sitting in a lifelike pose. The surface is matte and subtly textured, resembling painted ceramic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the puppy's face, floppy ears, and both front legs, with the collar visible around the neck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's profile, showing the full length of the body, tail, and the collar around the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back, tail, and hind legs, with the dog's head and ears only partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, with the head, snout, and body contours clearly visible, as well as the collar.
